findings.title: Dormant privileged identity
findings.subject: legacy.admin
findings.recommendation: Validate business need, disable or remove elevated access, and retain review evidence.

findings.title: Service account without accountable owner
findings.subject: svc_reporting
findings.recommendation: Assign a business and technical owner, validate purpose, rotate credentials, and reduce privileges.

findings.recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

findings.title: Delegated support access combined with active managed-asset session
findings.subject: sam.adams

findings.subject: Server Admins
findings.recommendation: Reduce privilege concentration, separate administrative duties, and validate whether access can be scoped by system or role.
